protein_name: Acts as a transcriptional coactivator of serum response factor (SRF). Required for skeletal myogenic differentiation. 5 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Cellular Component: cytoplasm; glutamatergic synapse; nuclear speck; nucleus; postsynapse; presynapse
raw_fields.Biological Process: cell differentiation; muscle organ development; positive regulation of miRNA transcription; positive regulation of striated muscle tissue development; positive regulation of transcription by RNA polymerase II; regulation of modification of postsynaptic structure; smooth muscle cell differentiation
